vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization for user inputs is not implemented.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input validation and sanitization for all user inputs to prevent injection attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: No indication of CORS or Helmet middleware implementation.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware to set secure HTTP headers and configure CORS with a whitelist to restrict resource sharing.
Incorporate rate limiting middleware to control the number of requests to the server within a specified time frame.
